title: Skills Self-Assessment Framework
when_to_use: At the end of each learning tier and monthly for ongoing development

steps.title: List All Skills
steps.instruction: List all skills from the track curriculum
steps.tip: Use the mission titles and key topics as your skills checklist. Be comprehensive

steps.title: Self-Rate
steps.instruction: Rate each 1-5: 1=Heard of it, 2=Understand concept, 3=Can do with guidance, 4=Can do independently, 5=Can teach others
steps.tip: Be brutally honest. Overrating yourself prevents growth. Underrating leads to imposter syndrome. Aim for accuracy

steps.title: Identify Strengths
steps.tip: These are your differentiators. Build on them. They'll form the foundation of your professional identity

steps.title: Identify Gaps
steps.tip: These are your growth priorities. Don't be discouraged — everyone has gaps. The goal is awareness

steps.title: Create Action Plan
steps.instruction: For each gap, write one action to close it in the next 30 days
steps.tip: Be specific: 'Complete TryHackMe Nmap room' not 'Get better at scanning'. Specific actions get done

steps.title: Monthly Review
steps.instruction: Revisit this assessment monthly to track growth
steps.tip: Compare month-over-month. Celebrate improvements. Adjust priorities as you grow
